out_of_archetype_scope.criterion: Task does not fall within researcher's scope: mechanism investigation, first-principles extraction, pattern analysis, source discipline, comparative reasoning.
out_of_archetype_scope.observable_from_log: execution_log.role == 'researcher' AND execution_log.rejection_returned == true AND execution_log.rejection_reason CONTAINS 'archetype'

acceptance_checklist_fails.criterion: Dispatch brief fails one or more acceptance checklist items: objective unclear, slice boundary absent, evidence threshold absent, output schema absent, stop condition absent, chaining budget absent.
acceptance_checklist_fails.observable_from_log: execution_log.checklist_items_evaluated == true AND execution_log.checklist_failures COUNT > 0 AND execution_log.rejection_returned == true

no_clear_vertical_slice.criterion: Task has no narrow vertical slice — 'explore X' without boundary definition.
no_clear_vertical_slice.observable_from_log: execution_log.rejection_returned == true AND execution_log.rejection_reason CONTAINS 'vertical slice'

explicit_rejection_statement.criterion: Agent returns explicit 'Rejection' statement at top of response.

specific_reason_cited.criterion: Agent states specific rejection reason citing exact condition violated.
specific_reason_cited.observable_from_log: execution_log.rejection_reason IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(execution_log.rejection_reason) > 10

acceptance_criteria_stated.criterion: Agent states what specific changes would allow acceptance.
acceptance_criteria_stated.observable_from_log: execution_log.acceptance_criteria IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(execution_log.acceptance_criteria) > 5

did_not_accept_ambiguous_silently.criterion: Agent did NOT accept ambiguous dispatch without issuing a clarification request or rejection.

did_not_investigate_before_checklist.criterion: Agent did NOT begin investigation before acceptance checklist was passed.

did_not_make_product_decisions.criterion: Agent did NOT make product or architecture decisions in research output.
